# Compute aggregated signatures
# Last modified: 06/13/25
# Author: Kewalin Samart

```{r load libraries and sort scripts}
library(readr)
library(here)
source(here("scripts/00_background_genes_PA_functions.R"))
source(here("scripts/01_signature_aggregation_functions.R"))
```

```{r initialize arguments}
# example argument
metadata_path = here("data/TB_microarray_args.tsv")
data_path = here("data/microarray_TBsignatures")
direction = "up"
bg_source = "LINCS" # L1000 genes
extra_arg= "landmark"
output_dir = here("data/aggregated_signatures")
threshold <- NULL # aggregated gene score cutoff; 0.4 by default
if(is.null(threshold)){
    threshold <- 0.4
}
```

```{r compute membership matrix}
gene_membership_matrix = compute_membership_matrix(metadata_path = metadata_path, data_path = data_path, 
                          direction = direction, bg_source = bg_source, 
                          output_dir = output_dir, extra_arg = extra_arg, save_result=TRUE)
```

```{r compute jaccard matrix}
jaccard_matrix = compute_jaccard_matrix(metadata_path = metadata_path, data_path = data_path, 
                       direction = direction, output_dir = output_dir, 
                       extra_arg = extra_arg, save_result=TRUE) 
```

```{r compute aggregated signature}
aggregate_signatures(gene_membership_matrix, jaccard_matrix, output_dir, direction, threshold=0.4, save_result=TRUE)
```
